title: Tackle Plugin Manifest
description: Schema for plugin.json files used by tackle-harness plugins.

type.description: Plugin type determining lifecycle and companion files.

source.description: Source identifier for non-core plugins (npm package name or local path).

triggers.description: Trigger phrases that activate this skill. Typically used by skill plugins.

dependencies.description: List of provider or plugin dependencies (e.g. 'provider:state-store').

provides.description: List of service identifiers this plugin provides (e.g. 'skill:task-creator').

metadata.description: Optional metadata for build and runtime behavior.

requiresPlanMode.description: Whether this skill must enter Plan mode before execution.

gatedByCode.description: Whether this plugin is gated by code-level hooks.

targets.description: Build targets this validator applies to.

deploy_assets.description: Whether this plugin deploys static assets.

capabilities.description: Declared runtime capabilities for sandbox and security control.

filesystem.description: Filesystem access whitelist. Uses a nested object (rather than boolean) to separately control read and write path patterns.

read.description: Glob patterns for paths the plugin may read.

write.description: Glob patterns for paths the plugin may write.
